channel.title: Density Field Dynamics — Research Corpus
channel.description: New papers and revisions in the Density Field Dynamics (DFD) research corpus by Gary Alcock. DFD is a scalar-refractive framework for gravity, electromagnetism, and the Standard Model.

item.title: General Relativity as the Padé Approximant of Density Field Dynamics
item.dc:creator: Gary Alcock
item.description: An exact identity: GR's isotropic-coordinate Schwarzschild lapse-squared equals [P_{1,1}(exp(u))]², while DFD's exterior solution gives exp(2u). GR is the m=1 slot in a Padé hierarchy; DFD is the entire-function limit. First difference at O(u³) gives a ~4.6% larger black-hole shadow.

item.title: Epoch Evolution of the MOND Crossover Scale: a⋆(z) = 2√α·cH(z)
item.dc:creator: Gary Alcock
item.description: Within DFD the galactic transition acceleration tracks cosmic expansion epoch-by-epoch: a⋆(z) = 2√α·cH(z). Predicts a⋆(z=1)/a⋆(0) ≈ 1.79, falsifiable by JWST high-z rotation curves.

item.title: Tree-Level No-Drive Theorem for the Minimal Optical-Metric EM Sector
item.dc:creator: Gary Alcock
item.description: Proves λ_bare = 1 in the minimal tree-level optical-metric EM sector. Energy-density coupling, not stress invariant; no 2ω drive after volume integration for ideal cavity modes with energy equipartition.

item.title: Mach's Principle in Density Field Dynamics
item.dc:creator: Gary Alcock
item.description: Maps DFD against the Bondi–Samuel Mach taxonomy. The structural identity a⋆ = 2√α·cH₀ ties the galactic transition scale to cosmic expansion; the ψ rest frame is dynamically determined by cosmic matter while the flat R³ kinematic substrate remains absolute.

item.title: Density Field Dynamics: A Complete Unified Theory (v3.3)
item.dc:creator: Gary Alcock
item.description: 200-page integrating treatment, 20 main sections, 26 appendices, 131 references. Covers gravity sector, gauge emergence, and cosmology with derivations of α, fermion masses, CKM, neutrino splittings, the Higgs VEV, and the cosmological constant hierarchy. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18066593

item.title: Constitutive Derivation of Tensor Gravitational Radiation from CP²×S³ Spectral Geometry
item.dc:creator: Gary Alcock
item.description: ψ and h_TT as irreducible parts of a single zero-mode parent tensor on CP²×S³. Lichnerowicz rigidity rules out unwanted modes; c_T = c exactly (GW170817 satisfied). DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19365418

item.title: Uniqueness of the Internal Manifold: Deriving CP²×S³ from Vacuum Axioms
item.dc:creator: Gary Alcock
item.description: Proves CP²×S³ is the unique internal manifold for DFD's spectral completion under six physically motivated axioms. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19415584

item.title: Ab Initio Derivation of the Charged Fermion Mass Spectrum from Density Field Dynamics
item.dc:creator: Gary Alcock
item.description: All nine charged fermion masses (e, μ, τ, u, d, s, c, b, t) from CP²×S³ topology using A₅ class geometry and Spinᶜ bundle degrees. 1.42% mean error across three orders of magnitude.

item.title: Ab Initio Derivation of the Fine-Structure Constant from Density Field Dynamics (v2.1)
item.dc:creator: Gary Alcock
item.description: Closed-form derivation of α⁻¹ = 137.035999854 from Chern–Simons quantization on CP²×S³ topology. Sub-ppm precision against CODATA 2022. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18045109

item.title: Solar-Locked Differential in Ion–Neutral Optical Frequency Ratios
item.dc:creator: Gary Alcock
item.description: Analysis of ROCIT 2022 Yb⁺/Sr frequency ratio data revealing perihelion-locked annual modulation: A = (−1.045 ± 0.078) × 10⁻¹⁷ at Z = 13.5σ.
